examples: In addition, the use of new drugs can temporarily alleviate the HIV/AIDS related depression, fatigue and fear, so HIV/AIDS patients increased the abuse of amphetamine-type stimulants.
But after just two weeks of daily game therapy, he stopped taking Ritalin, a prescription amphetamine.
Data on people arrested in Sweden show many who admitted to taking amphetamine actually tested positive for meth.
Animal studies have shown brain abnormalities persisting four years after amphetamine use stops.
